title: Change comma delimiter used in a connect column

posts.author: W_Bick (Will Bickerton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday community!.

I’m keen to see if there are any plans to change the delimiter monday uses to distinguish multiple values entered into a “Connect column”.

When I load the data to PowerBI using the API, the multiple values are delimited using a comma. In my use case, when I connect multiple values in a connect column, the name of one of the values may include a comma. Then, in PowerBI, I’m not able to split this data out using a comma as a delimiter as commas are also used within the string of a given item.

Do you have any suggestion for how this problem could be resolved?

Thanks!
